## Environment | 环境信息

- Mos version | Mos 版本:
- macOS version | macOS 版本:
- Mac model / chip | 机型 / 芯片:
- Mouse / trackpad model | 鼠标 / 触控板型号:
- Connection type | 连接方式: Bluetooth / USB receiver / USB-C / Other
- Affected application | 受影响应用: Whole system / App name
- Accessibility permission granted | 是否已授予辅助功能权限: Yes / No
- Other input, mouse, keyboard, or window-management tools | 其他输入、鼠标、键盘或窗口管理工具:

## Mos Settings Involved | 涉及的 Mos 设置

- [ ] Smooth scrolling | 平滑滚动
- [ ] Reverse scrolling | 反转滚动方向
- [ ] Per-app settings | 按应用配置
- [ ] Button bindings | 按钮绑定
- [ ] Open app/script/file action | 打开 App、脚本或文件动作
- [ ] Logi device integration | Logi 设备集成
- [ ] Updates / Sparkle | 应用更新
